title: Elemental Tiers
description: Custom elemental tiers with special powers.
body:
Elemental Stages binds you to one of seven primal forces that increase your power and can be upgraded by killing players. The player gains a random element apon first joining a server, and they start at Stage 1. 

Stage 2 - each grants a unique passive bonus—and as you slay other players you climb through six power tiers. 

Stage 3 - your attacks gain element-specific effects. 

Stage 4 - press G to trigger your mobility skill (dash if Arial, fiery wave if Infernal, sculk puddle shrink with the Soulbound Dagger, 40-block vine grapple with Verdant, water clear if Aquatic, etc.)

Stage 5 - you earn biome-based buffs. 

Stage 6 - awards you a legendary weapon you activate with V—each weapon (Arial Mace, Infernal Blade, Abyssal Bow, vanilla-enchanted Aquatic Trident, tiny-scale Soulbound Dagger sonic strike, Verdant Scythe drain) unleashes a powerful signature ability. 

Swap your element at any time with Shift + right-click on the Element Switcher and speed up your rise with the Stage Upgrader.

Additional Information: This mod was created with assistance from CreativeMode, an AI mod creator. All ideas, art and prompts were mine. https://www.creativemode.net/mod/mace-trims-gpvmk2us
